headline: Samsung can't afford to play it safe with Apple's first foldable looming
summary: Samsung's Galaxy Unpacked event will showcase new Fold and Flip phones. A new, wider Fold form factor is expected. This move is critical as Apple's first foldable device approaches.

headline: The Light Flip is a minimalist flip phone with a point to prove
summary: Light is launching the Light Flip, a new minimalist flip phone. It returns to their no-distractions ethos after a more complex device. The phone aims to offer a simpler mobile experience.

headline: Google launches a cheaper alternative to large AI security models like Mythos
summary: Google introduced Gemini 3.6 Flash Cyber, a new AI security model. It aims to quickly identify and fix security vulnerabilities. This model offers a cost-efficient alternative to larger AI systems.

headline: Stellantis taps Mobileye for hands-free driving assist
summary: Stellantis will integrate Intel's Mobileye technology for Level 2 hands-free driving. The system includes Mobileye's EyeQ chip and Road Experience Management data. Features are expected to launch in Stellantis vehicles starting in 2027.

headline: Kaylee Hottle, Who Played Jia in Godzilla vs. Kong and Godzilla X Kong: The New Empire, Dies Aged 18
summary: Actress Kaylee Hottle has tragically passed away at 18. She was known for her role as Jia in the Godzilla vs. Kong films. Her death is a sad loss for fans and the film community.

headline: San Diego Comic-Con 2026: How to Watch and What to Expect
summary: A guide provides details on how to follow San Diego Comic-Con 2026. Expect major reveals from Marvel's Hall H and gaming presentations. IGN will host live shows with exclusive news and insights.

headline: The X-Files LEGO Set Has Gillian Anderson Snapping on a Pair of Latex Gloves Once More
summary: Gillian Anderson unveiled the new X-Files LEGO set. The highly anticipated set is scheduled to go on sale next month. It will be available for $200, delighting fans of the series.

headline: 'We've Been Going Full Speed Ahead for Over 11 years': Nintendo Explains Why It Hasn't Made Splatoon 4 — Yet
summary: Nintendo developers clarified why Splatoon 4 hasn't been released yet. They prioritized launching a cooperative spinoff, Splatoon Raiders, first. The Splatoon franchise has been active for over 11 years.

headline: Ann Widdecombe was hit on head 21 times with hammer, prosecutors say
summary: Prosecutors allege Joshua Kerry attacked Ann Widdecombe with a hammer. The assault occurred at her Devon home while she was eating lunch. Kerry reportedly stole her wallet following the attack.

headline: London-based civil servants offered move to No 10 North in Manchester
summary: London-based civil servants are being offered relocation packages. The incentive is for those willing to move to 'No 10 North' in Manchester. This initiative aims to decentralize government operations.

headline: Row escalates in Ukraine over army chief's future
summary: A significant dispute is escalating in Ukraine regarding the army chief's position. Protesters are demanding the removal of Oleksandr Syrskyi. They also call for former defense minister Mykhailo Fedorov's reinstatement by Friday.

headline: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for deaths of soldiers
summary: The US has launched new strikes against targets in Iran. Former President Trump issued a warning of retaliation for soldier deaths. Iran claims to have hit ships and targets in the region.
